title: Blue Balloons, 50 Pcs Balloon Pack, 12 Inch Pastel Blue Balloons, Macaron Blue Latex Balloons for Blue Theme Birthday Party Wedding Boy Baby Shower Princess Carnival Events Gender Reveal Decorations
features: Package Included: 12-inch macaron blue pastel balloons (50pcs) + 1 pc 10M long balloon ribbons, ideal blue birthday decorations, gender reveal decorations, baby shower decorations for girl, baby shower decorations, birthday decorations for women, first communion decorations, birthday decorations for girls

Premium Durable Latex: All materials of balloons are of premium durable for decorate at your party. These are thicker than others, not easy to break, very durable. Balloons can last a long time, and you can continue to use it next time

Happy DIY Time: You can hang these balloons on doors, walls, ceilings, doorways, and other places you want to decorate, also can thread them together with rope, and create more usages by using your imagination

Memorable Party Decorations:12 Inches balloons are very popular in party decorations. You can use these 50 balloons to make a plain theme balloon garland, or you can make a special balloon garland with other balloons of different sizes or colors. 12 Inches balloons are nice favors for birthday party, baby shower party, wedding party, anniversary party, New Year party, Valentines, Christmas, and outdoor or indoor holiday celebration events. You will make a most memorable party

Attention: We suggest to be slow when inflating the balloons. You can use a pump to inflate to 90% and then control the air volume so as not to break. Avoid the balloon contact with high temperatures, and avoid using pointed objects to stab the balloon.Please kindly note that any holes or popped balloons within 1-3 pcs for every 100 balloons is a normal
